name: Rivera Mobile Auto Repair
tagline: Mobile auto repair serving Salinas, Prunedale, and North Monterey County.
services: Brake pads, rotors, and fluid service
highlights: No tow needed — work done in your driveway or parking lot
Most jobs same-day when booked before noon
18 years ASE-style experience; former dealership tech
Flat-rate quotes given before any work starts

snippets: Marco came out to my apartment and swapped my alternator in under two hours. Saved me a tow.
Straightforward, honest pricing. Texted me the diagnostic codes before quoting.
Showed up on time and cleaned up after. Will call him for every car issue from now on.
